phase-summary.outcome: Visualization controls now run in one viewport model: `3D`, `JSON`, and `Deltas` all replace the same content area. Reachability moved to header badges, and Entity Tile was removed.

file.description: Removed summary-tab split; added `btn-viz-deltas`; added icon/color-coded reachability badges in panel header; removed `panel-entity-tile` block.
Phase 44 plans updated with `44-07` viewport parity pass.
Added completed task `44-07` with commands and dependency on `44-06`.

decision.summary: Deltas should switch the main visualization area the same way JSON and 3D do.
decision.impact: Improves consistency and reduces split-attention between preview and controls.

tests.test: `pnpm --dir docs-site exec tsc --noEmit` (fails due pre-existing `app/dungeonbreak-content-app/dungeon-explorer/page.tsx` type errors outside this change).

next.action: If desired, widen or paginate header reachability badges when K > 8 to avoid wrapping on narrow screens.
